text.title: C# ASP.NET Core + EF Core Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping target runtime + workload to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml or a sibling methodology.

decision-tree.root-question: Target runtime is ASP.NET Core 6+ on long-running host?

conclusion.verdict: use feature folder: Controller + Service + DTO + EntityConfig + xUnit slice test
skip-this-methodology: edge stack uses Node/Bun; ASP.NET Core cold-start too high
skip-this-methodology: this methodology targets ASP.NET Core only; first migrate to .NET 8

text.example: runtime=aspnet_core_long_running → workload=http_api → produce feature folder with [ApiController], scoped DbContext, record DTOs, AsNoTracking reads, xUnit test.
